outlets.name: CNN
outlets.headline: Mixed signals on Iran talks as war rages on and oil prices climb back over $100
outlets.summary: CNN live updates focus on humanitarian cost and scrutinizing Trump's claims about Iran negotiations, noting Iran publicly denied any talks while the White House said conversations were "productive."

outlets.name: CNN
outlets.headline: Trump delays strikes on Iranian power plants after 'very good' talks with Tehran
outlets.summary: CNN leads with Trump's surprise Truth Social post announcing a 5-day pause on Iran energy strikes citing productive talks — Iran's immediate denial and markets surging on the announcement.

outlets.name: NPR
outlets.headline: Iran defiant as Trump delays striking power plants for 5 days
outlets.summary: NPR reports on the sharp contradiction between Trump's claim of 'productive talks' and Iran's immediate categorical denial — with Araghchi calling the claim designed to 'mislead oil traders.'

outlets.name: Washington Post
outlets.headline: Trump says US negotiating end to war with Iran — Tehran says no such talks are happening
outlets.summary: WaPo examines the 5-day pause against the backdrop of unprecedented IDF strikes across Iran — Tabriz (6 killed), Khorramabad (1 child killed), Tehran IRGC HQ — and what it means for war trajectory.

outlets.name: Fox News
outlets.headline: Trump announces 'productive' Iran talks to end conflict; market rallies on ceasefire hopes
outlets.summary: Fox News emphasizes Trump's diplomatic framing and the market's positive response to the 5-day energy-strike pause, describing it as a potential turning point in the conflict.

outlets.name: Fox News
outlets.headline: Trump announces 'productive' Iran talks to end conflict; postpones energy strikes 5 days
outlets.summary: Fox News frames Trump's 5-day pause as diplomatic strength — citing Trump's CNBC claim this represents 'regime change' and markets surging. Notes IDF delivered 'wide-scale wave' of Tehran strikes overnight.

outlets.name: Washington Examiner
outlets.headline: Trump postpones strikes on Iranian power plants for five days
outlets.summary: Washington Examiner reports the 5-day pause as a potential off-ramp to the war, with Trump framing it as momentum toward resolution while noting CENTCOM destroyed Qom drone engine plant.

outlets.name: CBS News
outlets.headline: Trump delays Iran power plant strikes for 5 days; IDF hits IRGC HQ, Basij base in Tehran
outlets.summary: CBS News live blog covers Trump's pause announcement alongside IDF overnight strikes on Tehran infrastructure and civilian casualties across Iran including Tabriz and Khorramabad.

outlets.name: Al Jazeera
outlets.headline: Where do reported US-Iran 'negotiations' leave Israel?
outlets.summary: Al Jazeera examines how US-Iran backchannel talks are proceeding without Israeli involvement, raising questions about whether Israel's war aims can be met under a bilateral deal.

outlets.name: Al Jazeera
outlets.headline: 'Unprecedented': Israel, US carry out extensive strikes across Iran — Tabriz, Khorramabad, Urmia hit
outlets.summary: Al Jazeera's Tehran correspondent reports explosions 'unprecedented in scale' on eastern Tehran, with simultaneous strikes killing civilians in Tabriz (6), Khorramabad (1 child), Urmia. Iran denies Trump's 'productive talks' claim.

outlets.name: Euronews
outlets.headline: Iran threatens to destroy regional infrastructure as Israel warns war to last weeks
outlets.summary: Euronews leads with Iran's Defense Council threat to mine the Persian Gulf and strike US-allied power plants across the Gulf if attacked, alongside Trump's 5-day pause announcement.

outlets.name: Reuters
outlets.headline: US planning weeks-long operation to seize and reopen Hormuz — including possible Kharg Island operation
outlets.summary: Reuters reports USS Tripoli (2,000+ Marines) moving toward region as US plans a weeks-long Hormuz seizure operation — including potential Kharg Island capture — even as Trump's 5-day pause offers diplomatic off-ramp.

outlets.name: Times of Israel
outlets.headline: 'Persona non grata': Lebanon boots Iran's envoy after proxy Hezbollah drew country into war
outlets.summary: Times of Israel leads with Lebanon's expulsion of Iran's ambassador as a landmark development, while also covering continued Iranian missile strikes on Tel Aviv and Netanya.

outlets.name: Times of Israel
outlets.headline: Trump says he's holding productive talks with Iran on ending all hostilities; postpones ultimatum to bomb energy sites
outlets.summary: Times of Israel Day 24 liveblog: Trump's Truth Social pause announcement, IDF wide-scale Tehran strikes hitting IRGC HQ and Basij base, CENTCOM Qom plant destroyed, joint Iran-Hezbollah northern Israel barrage.

outlets.name: Haaretz
outlets.headline: Trump: US Holding Talks With Iran Over 'Complete' Resolution of Mideast Hostilities
outlets.summary: Haaretz Day 24 coverage leads with Trump's claim of productive Iran talks — noting that Iran immediately denied any contact and that IDF delivered 'unprecedented' wave of Tehran strikes in the same morning.

outlets.name: Jerusalem Post
outlets.headline: US plans weeks-long Hormuz operation; IDF strikes IRGC HQ, Basij, rocket factory across Tehran
outlets.summary: Jerusalem Post reports US planning a weeks-long operation to force open Hormuz — potentially seizing Kharg Island — alongside IDF's overnight wide-scale strike campaign on Tehran's IRGC infrastructure.

outlets.name: IRNA (Iranian State Media)
outlets.headline: Islamic Republic confirms: No negotiations with United States have occurred; Trump claims are fabricated
outlets.summary: Iranian state media flatly denied Trump's claims of productive negotiations, framing his statements as an attempt to manipulate oil prices. The IRGC called Trump a "deceitful American president."

outlets.name: PressTV
outlets.headline: US president backs down following Iran's firm warning; Trump delays energy strikes 5 days
outlets.summary: PressTV frames Trump's 5-day pause as a retreat driven by Iranian military deterrence. State TV also hailed the announcement as proof of Iran's 'Operation True Promise 4' deterring US escalation.

outlets.name: IRNA
outlets.headline: Iran denies Trump's 'productive talks' claim — 'no direct or indirect contact' with US
outlets.summary: IRNA publishes Iran Foreign Ministry's categorical denial of Trump's Truth Social claim of productive negotiations, with FM Araghchi's statement that the claim is designed to 'mislead oil traders.'

outlets.name: Fars News
outlets.headline: Iran to mine Persian Gulf, strike Gulf power plants if coastline or islands attacked — Defense Council
outlets.summary: Fars News covers Iran's Defense Council threat to mine the Persian Gulf and destroy power plants supplying US military bases across the Gulf if Iran's coastline or islands are attacked.
